review_text: World’s most beautiful beach . Not sure if the title is still valid but the beach does have all the ingredients for it.
I talking about the whitheaven beach not about the resort. The jetski was amazing and fastest.
Yeah, I think this busy beach is a bit overrated. Still great to see the extremely fine sand and crystal clear water!
very remote and perfect for relaxing
Fantastic adventure to be had with Crystal clear water and white sand.

In the 76 countries that I visited, no beach matches this one. Outwardly!
Come to visit at all costs.
Der schönste Strand der Welt. Wir haben drei Tage gecampt, es war ein Traum!
